description: Inline flowing with text: an image sharing its line with text sits on the baseline and advances like a word (icon at line start via lookahead, image mid-sentence, tall image growing the line box, linked image staying clickable). Standalone and floated images keep the block path.
visual_assertions: The blue icon starts the first line with text beside it on the same baseline.
The mid-sentence icon flows with the words and the paragraph wraps naturally.
The tall green image grows its line box without overlapping the line above; its bottom sits on the baseline.
The linked icon and its label are one clickable region.
The standalone image renders block-level below its caption.
